title: bromus villosus subsp. maximus
intro: Bromus villosus subsp. maximus, also known as soft brome, is a subspecies of the brome grass family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
